REAL005A.next: 补齐逐年 paper+answer source anchors and per-year adapter diagnostics before advancing REAL005A.

RG002 adapter diagnostics are incomplete for years: 2015, 2016, 2017, 2018, 2019, 2020, 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025

REAL005B.next: Only evaluate per-question structure/review closure after REAL005A source+adapter coverage is complete.
blockers: REAL005A is not yet closed; do not interpret question-structure and review coverage as a closeable slice yet.

REAL005C.next: Keep REAL005C blocked until source coverage and per-question review closure are both complete.
blockers: REAL005A and REAL005B remain open; usage/export/analysis closure cannot be promoted ahead of earlier slices.

REAL005D.next: Do not rewrite outward completion wording until REAL005A/B/C are all closed.
blockers: closureStatus remains not_closed; truthful docs must continue to say not_closed

gaps.reason: dashboard state is contract_done; gap=REAL005 当前只能输出 not_closed 缺逐年逐题闭环证据
gaps.nextAction: complete yearly question evidence and update dashboard only after every REAL005 criterion is satisfied

requiredCriteria.evidenceRequired: source manifest report with 11 years and paper answer hash coverage
requiredCriteria.blockingGapPolicy: missing year source hash or answer file keeps closure not_closed
missing adapter diagnostic or unresolved high severity warning keeps closure not_closed

requiredCriteria.evidenceRequired: year batch ingest report with expected_count actual_count missing_question_numbers
requiredCriteria.blockingGapPolicy: missing expected count or any missing question keeps closure not_closed

requiredCriteria.evidenceRequired: answer coverage report with per-question source anchor
requiredCriteria.blockingGapPolicy: missing answer without takeover reason keeps closure not_closed

requiredCriteria.evidenceRequired: source region and asset report with no placeholder bbox except time-boxed gate_na
requiredCriteria.blockingGapPolicy: placeholder bbox without gate_na evidence keeps closure not_closed

requiredCriteria.evidenceRequired: question structure report and review queue reason
requiredCriteria.blockingGapPolicy: raw text only without review reason keeps closure not_closed

requiredCriteria.evidenceRequired: tagging suggestion report with confidence source and no_active_write
requiredCriteria.blockingGapPolicy: tag missing or AI direct active write keeps closure not_closed

requiredCriteria.evidenceRequired: review audit report with per-question terminal status and edited fields
requiredCriteria.blockingGapPolicy: open queue or no audit keeps closure not_closed

requiredCriteria.evidenceRequired: API/UI smoke using real reviewed questions
requiredCriteria.blockingGapPolicy: source review failure keeps closure not_closed

requiredCriteria.evidenceRequired: search paper export smoke with real question ids
requiredCriteria.blockingGapPolicy: only synthetic fixture proof keeps closure not_closed

requiredCriteria.evidenceRequired: analysis smoke with real reviewed question ids and no formal history write
requiredCriteria.blockingGapPolicy: synthetic-only analysis proof keeps closure not_closed

requiredCriteria.evidenceRequired: rollback privacy and AI boundary report
requiredCriteria.blockingGapPolicy: missing rollback or privacy evidence keeps closure not_closed

requiredCriteria.evidenceRequired: layout noise report with per-page noise region and retained region counts
requiredCriteria.blockingGapPolicy: noise retained in question content without review reason keeps closure not_closed

requiredCriteria.evidenceRequired: formula fidelity report with OMML/LaTeX/fallback coverage
requiredCriteria.blockingGapPolicy: formula OCR candidate without fallback image or reviewStatus keeps closure not_closed

requiredCriteria.evidenceRequired: table structure report with rows columns sourceRegion confidence reviewStatus
requiredCriteria.blockingGapPolicy: table only stored as image without pending_review reason keeps closure not_closed
manual correction path missing or no audit keeps closure not_closed

rollback: git restore tracked files; remove generated REAL005 evidence reports if this standard is reverted
summaryChinese: REAL005 判定标准已安装并通过自检；当前真实状态是 not_closed，仍需完成 逐年逐题闭环证据。
